    • services/api/eventService
    • EventService

    Variable EventServiceConst

    EventService: {
        addEvent(
            data: {
                description: string | null;
                endTime: string;
                isAllDay: boolean;
                name: string;
                startTime: string;
                workspaceID: string | null;
            },
        ): Promise<CalendarEventDTO>;
        deleteEvent(eventID: string): Promise<any>;
        getAllEventsOfUser(): Promise<CalendarEventDTO[]>;
        getAllEventsOfWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<CalendarEventDTO[]>;
        getEventCountOfUser(): Promise<number>;
        getEventCountOfWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<number>;
        getSpaceInfosOfEvent(eventID: string): Promise<WorkspaceDTO>;
        saveEvent(data: SaveEventDTO): Promise<CalendarEventDTO>;
    } = ...

    Client for the calendar event endpoints (create, update, delete and various queries). Methods throw on a non-OK response.

    Type Declaration

    • addEvent: function
      • addEvent(
            data: {
                description: string | null;
                endTime: string;
                isAllDay: boolean;
                name: string;
                startTime: string;
                workspaceID: string | null;
            },
        ): Promise<CalendarEventDTO>

        Creates a new event, optionally inside a workspace.

        Parameters

        • data: {
              description: string | null;
              endTime: string;
              isAllDay: boolean;
              name: string;
              startTime: string;
              workspaceID: string | null;
          }

          Event fields (name, description, all-day, start/end time, optional workspace).

        Returns Promise<CalendarEventDTO>

        The created event.

        • Defined in services/api/eventService.ts:22

      • deleteEvent(eventID: string): Promise<any>

        Deletes an event.

        • eventID: string

          The event to delete.

    • getAllEventsOfUser: function
      • getAllEventsOfUser(): Promise<CalendarEventDTO[]>

        Returns all of the current user's personal events.

        Returns Promise<CalendarEventDTO[]>

        The list of events.

        Returns all events of a workspace.

          The workspace whose events are requested.

        The list of events.

    • getEventCountOfWorkspace: function
      • getEventCountOfWorkspace(workspaceID: string): Promise<number>

        Returns the number of events in a workspace.

        Parameters

        • workspaceID: string

          The workspace to count events for.

        Returns Promise<number>

        The event count.

    • getSpaceInfosOfEvent: function
      • getSpaceInfosOfEvent(eventID: string): Promise<WorkspaceDTO>

        Returns the workspace an event belongs to.

        Parameters

        • eventID: string

          The event whose workspace is requested.

        Returns Promise<WorkspaceDTO>

        The workspace.

        • Defined in services/api/eventService.ts:190
    • saveEvent: function
      • saveEvent(data: SaveEventDTO): Promise<CalendarEventDTO>

        Updates an event (only provided fields are changed).

        Parameters

        • data: SaveEventDTO

          The event ID plus the fields to change.

        Returns Promise<CalendarEventDTO>

        The updated event.
